creator: support@fluxsoft.com
text:
I have 13 build 20201112 as an NFSv3 server. The hardware is a Pi 4. The export is mounted on a Mac running 10.14.6. I'm rsyncing to it, and after a while, it hangs. 

This is easily reproducible.

The NFS server doesn't appear to be hung as I can manually create files on the mount on the Mac. 

Rsyncing to rsync via SSH works and does not hang.
